title: [lichen_util.h:119-176] lichen_link_strerror missing ESRCH ENOBUFS common errors
description:
Gap found: Error code coverage not verified.

Why this was missed: String function not matched against all possible callers.

The actual bug: The lichen_link_strerror() inline function maps error codes to strings. It covers common errors but is missing several codes that could be returned by Zephyr or LICHEN code:
- ESRCH: Could be returned by thread operations
- ENOBUFS: Returned by net_pkt_alloc when pool exhausted
- ETIMEDOUT: Returned by k_mutex_lock with timeout
- ENOSPC: Returned by lichen_peer_add when table full

The default case returns 'unknown error' which is fine, but for debugging, having specific strings for all expected errors improves log clarity. Compare Round 1 finding about -ENOSPC in peer_add. Priority 4 as fallback exists.
close_reason: Fixed: Added ESRCH and ENOBUFS error codes to lichen_link_strerror switch statement
